spirit_lash.name: Spirit Lash
spirit_lash.description: Setup/Builder: A lash of spectral force. Generates 15 Concentration and 1 Aether Pip.

veil_opening.name: Veil Opening
veil_opening.description: Setup: Briefly open a door to the void. Generates 2 Aether Pips and applies [Marked].

grand_invocation.name: Grand Invocation
grand_invocation.description: Payoff: Summon a massive spectral entity for a single strike. Consumes 5 Aether Pips.

synergy_explosion.name: Synergy Explosion
synergy_explosion.description: Payoff/AOE: Detonate your companion's stored energy. Consumes 3 Aether Pips to deal AOE damage around your companion.

spirit_shield.name: Spirit Shield
spirit_shield.description: Defense: A shield of protective spirits. Grants 40% Magic and Physical reduction.

banish.name: Banishment
banish.description: Defense/Disruption: Force an enemy into the void for 2 ticks. They cannot act and take damage.

veil_step.name: Veil Step
veil_step.description: Mobility: Teleport to any location within the same room instantly.

call_avatar.name: Call Avatar
call_avatar.description: Utility/Signature: Summon a powerful avatar to fight for you for 60 seconds.

summoner_physiology.name: Summoner Physiology
summoner_physiology.description: Passive: Veil Walker. You gain 10% Magic power for every spectral entity you have summoned and your Veil Step breaks all movement blocks.
